ddls:
CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "phase" TEXT /* Phase of the software development where the issue was reported */,
  "feature" TEXT /* Feature or component of the software where the issue was found */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue (e.g., Pass, Test, Fail) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the issue (e.g., bug, question, feature request) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the issue (e.g., Completed, Current, New) */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* User ID of the person assigned to resolve the issue */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the last person who updated the issue */,
  "last_updated_on" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the issue */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who reported the issue */,
  "reported_on" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the issue was reported */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Deadline for resolving the issue */,
  "estimated_hours" REAL /* Estimated time required to resolve the issue */,
  "actual_hours" REAL /* Actual time spent on resolving the issue */,
  "reproducibility" TEXT /* How often the issue can be reproduced */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Severity of the impact of the issue */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Detailed description of how the issue was resolved */,
  "related_issues" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of IDs of related issues */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags for categorizing the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_phase FOREIGN KEY ("phase") REFERENCES phases ("phase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_feature FOREIGN KEY ("feature") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_priority FOREIGN KEY ("priority") REFERENCES priorities ("priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, project manager, admin) */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phases" (
  "phase_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each phase */,
  "phase_name" TEXT /* Name of the phase (e.g., 4.2.0, 5.0.0) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the phase */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the phase */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the phase */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the phase (e.g., active, completed, planned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., Signal Configuration, Turning Movement Counts) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "parent_feature_id" TEXT /* ID of the parent feature, if any */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time the feature was created */,
  "last_modified_on" TEXT /* Date and time the feature was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Pass, Test, Fail) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the status is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., bug, question, feature request) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the category is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "priorities" (
  "priority_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each priority */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the priority (e.g., Completed, Current, New) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the priority */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the priority is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the comment is related to */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the comment has resolved the issue */,
  "related_comments" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of IDs of related comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the attachment is related to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the attachment */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the attachment in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time the attachment was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who uploaded the attachment */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the attachment is publicly accessible */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., image, text, document) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the history entry is related to */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., status update, comment, attachment) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time the change was made */,
  "is_automated" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the change was made by an automated process */,
  "related_history_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of IDs of related history entries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_history_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
